title: Usted No Sabe Quien Soy Yo 2
overview: Ricardo, Crist, and Valentino keep getting into trouble. Ricardo needs money and wants his career as a comedian to take off, but fame comes through a video that goes viral. To save his relationship with Margarita, he must solve three problems: his mother, his therapist, and his manager.
